title: ennatos #1766
definition:
1) ninth
    1a) the ninth hour corresponds to our 3 o'clock in the afternoon
        for the sixth hour of the Jews coincides with the twelfth of
        the day as divided by our method, and the first hour of the
        day is 6 A.M. to us
